data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate the 'Print-to-mail service integration (Lob, Inkit)' is not directly supported by the evidence provided. The prior steps focus on customer interactions and booking processes, but do not include any evidence related to the print-to-mail service integration. Therefore, it is unclear whether this requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence provided for the 'Print-to-mail service integration (Lob, Inkit)' functionality.
